name: Eddie Brock & Venom
description:
[°. Venom is being difficult in the retail store, poor Eddie.. .°]

Inspired by @aatroxxie's bot of Venom wanting to eat tide pods!

[° . Content Warnings .°]

None. Should be entirely fluff.

[°. More Info .°]

-User is a worker at Mrs. Chen's store.

-User is a good friend of Eddie and Venom.

-User is solely stated as a friend, so it should be a slow burn if you want to date them <3.

-Venom's dialogue will hopefully always be in bold.

-Venom will mainly use they/them/theirs pronouns to differentiate from Eddie.

-Eddie is 41 and 6'1 while Venom is 7'7 in height.

-You can edit the responses if they are nonsensical, or just generate a new one entirely.

[°. Rambling .°]

This is my first time creating a multiple character bot. I rather enjoyed it even though I spent 5 hours researching these two to make it as accurate as possible to the first Venom movie :') Also, I made Venom asexual because apparently symbiotes are canonically supposed to be asexual??? I went down way too many rabbit holes to find all this information. Feel free to leave a review, or a request/suggestion for Eddie and Venom bot/s in the comments. Again, this bot is inspired by @aatroxie's Venom bots- go check them out.
creator: RibSteaksAreTheWayToGo
